name: Extracting Korean Text from Notebook Pages

chat_messages.text:
I can see that the images show notebook pages with handwritten Korean text. The notebook appears to be titled "Smile, On!" at the top of the pages. The pages contain what look like notes or tasks written in Korean handwriting.

The first page is dated "3/18" and marked "starter LVLXI" at the top. The content appears to be organized with numbered points and bullet points. There are references to some tasks and notes.

The second page continues with more bullet points and notes. I can see some technical references including "AI Tool", "feature eng", "HPC", and "X Explorer" among the Korean text.

Would you like me to try to provide a general summary of what these notes might be about based on the visible technical terms, or is there something specific you'd like to know about these notebook pages?
